name: acid_06_compound_unpacking
utterances: Iris is a parent of Juno, and Juno is a parent of Kian.
If X is a parent of Y then X is an ancestor of Y.
If X is an ancestor of Y and Y is an ancestor of Z then X is an ancestor of Z.
Juno is a parent of Kira.
Kira is a parent of Lio.
Translate this to German: symbolic state must remain auditable.
